pages.title: Potato Industry in China — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: China produces 94.4M tonnes of potatoes annually (#1 globally). World's largest producer — grows 25% of all potatoes globally

pages.title: Potato Industry in India — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: India produces 56.2M tonnes of potatoes annually (#2 globally). Uttar Pradesh alone produces more potatoes than most countries

pages.title: Potato Industry in Ukraine — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Ukraine produces 22.5M tonnes of potatoes annually (#3 globally). Highest per capita consumption in the world

pages.title: Potato Industry in Russia — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Russia produces 19.6M tonnes of potatoes annually (#4 globally). Second-highest per capita potato consumption globally

pages.title: Potato Industry in United States — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: United States produces 18.7M tonnes of potatoes annually (#5 globally). World's highest yields — Idaho alone produces 30% of US potatoes

pages.title: Potato Industry in Germany — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Germany produces 11.7M tonnes of potatoes annually (#6 globally). EU's largest potato producer and major starch manufacturer

pages.title: Potato Industry in Bangladesh — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Bangladesh produces 10.8M tonnes of potatoes annually (#7 globally). Feeds 170 million people — potato is now a staple alongside rice

pages.title: Potato Industry in France — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: France produces 8.8M tonnes of potatoes annually (#8 globally). EU's largest intra-EU potato exporter by value

pages.title: Potato Industry in Netherlands — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Netherlands produces 7.1M tonnes of potatoes annually (#9 globally). World's #1 seed potato exporter — 60%+ of global certified seed trade

pages.title: Potato Industry in Poland — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Poland produces 6.3M tonnes of potatoes annually (#10 globally). Area shrank from 2.8M to 188K ha in 20 years — dramatic structural shift

pages.title: Potato Industry in Egypt — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Egypt produces 6.3M tonnes of potatoes annually (#11 globally). Grows potatoes 365 days a year across 4 distinct seasons

pages.title: Potato Industry in Pakistan — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Pakistan produces 5.9M tonnes of potatoes annually (#12 globally). Production surged 186% in 10 years — fastest growth among top 20

pages.title: Potato Industry in Turkey — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Turkey produces 5.0M tonnes of potatoes annually (#13 globally). Rising potato power — expanding processing and export capacity

pages.title: Potato Industry in Peru — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Peru produces 5.6M tonnes of potatoes annually (#14 globally). Birthplace of the potato — 3,000+ native varieties in the Andes

pages.title: Potato Industry in Belgium — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Belgium produces 4.6M tonnes of potatoes annually (#15 globally). World's #1 frozen french fry exporter — $4.6B annually

pages.title: Potato Industry in United Kingdom — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: United Kingdom produces 5.0M tonnes of potatoes annually (#16 globally). Home of Maris Piper — the UK's most popular chip variety

pages.title: Potato Industry in Canada — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Canada produces 5.3M tonnes of potatoes annually (#17 globally). Home of McCain Foods — world's largest frozen potato company

pages.title: Potato Industry in Japan — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Japan produces 2.3M tonnes of potatoes annually (#18 globally). Hokkaido produces 80% — Calbee dominates with 70% chip market share

pages.title: Potato Industry in Brazil — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Brazil produces 3.7M tonnes of potatoes annually (#19 globally). Growing domestic market — largest potato producer in South America

pages.title: Potato Industry in Iran — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Iran produces 5.4M tonnes of potatoes annually (#20 globally). Major Middle Eastern producer — significant export to Iraq and Afghanistan

pages.title: Potato Industry in Algeria — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Algeria produces 5.1M tonnes of potatoes annually (#21 globally). Africa's largest potato producer — imports Dutch seed potatoes

pages.title: Potato Industry in Colombia — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Colombia produces 2.7M tonnes of potatoes annually (#22 globally). Andean highland production — criolla potato is a national staple

pages.title: Potato Industry in Australia — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Australia produces 1.4M tonnes of potatoes annually (#23 globally). High-yield production concentrated in Tasmania and Victoria

pages.title: Potato Industry in Nepal — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Nepal produces 3.1M tonnes of potatoes annually (#24 globally). Potato is a mountain staple — grown from 100m to 4,000m altitude

pages.title: Potato Industry in Kenya — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Kenya produces 2.0M tonnes of potatoes annually (#25 globally). East Africa's potato leader — CIP research hub in Nairobi

pages.title: Potato Industry in South Africa — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: South Africa produces 2.6M tonnes of potatoes annually (#26 globally). Africa's highest yields — advanced commercial farming sector

pages.title: Potato Industry in Indonesia — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Indonesia produces 1.4M tonnes of potatoes annually (#27 globally). Highland production in Java and Sumatra — rapidly growing chip market

pages.title: Potato Industry in Mexico — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Mexico produces 1.9M tonnes of potatoes annually (#28 globally). PepsiCo Sabritas drives processing demand — Sinaloa is the production hub

pages.title: Potato Industry in Denmark — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: Denmark produces 1.7M tonnes of potatoes annually (#29 globally). KMC starch cooperative and EU leader in organic potato production

pages.title: Potato Industry in South Korea — Potatopedia
pages.meta_description: South Korea produces 0.6M tonnes of potatoes annually (#30 globally). Growing snack market — Nongshim and Orion drive processing demand

pages.title: How Egypt Grows Potatoes 365 Days a Year (And Tripled Its Fry Exports) — Potatopedia
